name: Scheduled Reports
description: Send scheduled membership and financial summary reports to administrators by email. Activate to enable automatic periodic reports.
author: ChurchCRM Team

settings.label: Report Interval (hours)
settings.help: How often (in hours) to send the report. Use 24 for daily, 168 for weekly, 720 for monthly.

settings.label: Recipient Email Address
settings.help: Email address that will receive the scheduled reports. Leave blank to send to the configured church admin email.

settings.label: Report Types
settings.help: Comma-separated list of report types to include. Supported values: membership, financial.
